rationale: Profile is entirely non-technical — titles span Mechanical Engineer, Business Analyst, and HR Manager with descriptions covering sales, customer support, and operations, zero ML/IR work; also lists Stark Industries (fictional company) as an employer.

8 years at Amazon and Yellow.ai owning end-to-end ranking pipelines with BGE-large + Pinecone + LTR, NDCG/MRR/recall calibrated to live A/B at 8K QPS, LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning, expert-level Information Retrieval and Learning to Rank skills, IIT Roorkee tier_1 CS — textbook fit for this role.

7.4 years across Zoho (RAG + OpenAI embeddings + Pinecone), Locobuzz (XGBoost/LightGBM ranking), and Swiggy (Search Engineer), with expert BM25 and advanced Milvus/PyTorch skills, dual IIT degrees (IIT Hyderabad + IIT Delhi), covering hybrid retrieval, learning-to-rank, and production deployment at product companies.

3.9 years exclusively as a full-stack React/Node.js engineer at Razorpay with no production ML or IR work; FAISS listed as a skill but only at self-learner level with no deployed ranking or retrieval systems.

Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product at Salesforce, evolving it from hand-tuned scoring to a learning-to-rank model, with expert Weaviate and Semantic Search skills; limited by a single employer, tier_3 VIT education, and heavy LangChain emphasis flagged as a negative signal.

9.3-year career spans operations management, SEO content writing, and customer support with no engineering or ML work; two of three employers are fictional companies (Pied Piper and Wayne Enterprises).

Only 2.2 years of experience as a QA/test automation engineer at Pied Piper (fictional company), with no ML or IR work; current employer is a fictional company and the profile shows only self-learner AI exposure.

4.4 years at Flipkart and Meesho with lightweight recommendation and time-series work, but top skills are OpenCV and YOLO (computer vision — explicit JD negative signal), with no demonstrated NDCG/ranking evaluation ownership or hybrid retrieval experience.

Only 1.4 years as a Business Analyst with career history showing logistics operations management; AI interest is limited to online courses on RAG/vector DBs with no production ML or IR deployment despite a tier_2 PhD.

5.4-year career is data engineering (Spark, Airflow, Snowflake/dbt) with skills dominated by Computer Vision, GANs, and Diffusion Models — wrong domain with no IR/search/ranking work; current employer Initech is a fictional company.
